title: TOML ↔ JSON
description: Bi-directional live conversion between TOML and JSON with nested tables, array-of-tables, inline tables; line-numbered errors; Cargo / config / nested samples included.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and serialization happen in your browser — nothing is uploaded.

placeholder.json: Paste JSON; root must be an object

hint.bidirectional: Edit either side to auto-sync the other; lock direction for one-way only.
